name: Family member died on job in Salt Lake - what benefits?

mainEntity.name: Family member died on job in Salt Lake - what benefits?

acceptedAnswer.description: Dependents get death benefits via workers comp; third-party suit possible.[7] Context: Exclusive vs employer; extras if negligence.[7] Key factors: Burial costs, wage replacement to spouse/kids. Practical guidance: File promptly; gather death certificate. Lawyer pursues all avenues. Compassionate process.
